signal_strength.label: Moderate
signal_strength.summary: RoleRadar found useful resume evidence, but the analysis may improve with clearer skill wording or stronger role-specific details.

smart_analysis: Your resume may not closely match the wording and priorities of this job description yet.
This role appears to value communication. Consider adding experience with teamwork, presentations, documentation, or stakeholder collaboration.
Your resume may need stronger alignment with the role before applying.

fit_analysis.label: Needs More Role Evidence
fit_analysis.summary: Right now, the resume does not show enough clear evidence for what this role is asking for.
fit_analysis.next_action: This may be a stretch role for now. Strengthen the resume with more relevant skills, projects, or experience before relying on it for this kind of application.

action_plan.title: Make Your Resume Match the Role Better
action_plan.why_it_matters: Your resume may include relevant experience, but the wording does not clearly mirror the job description yet. Recruiters and screening tools need to quickly see how your background connects to the role.
action_plan.suggested_project: Rewrite 2 to 3 resume bullets using language from the job description while keeping the experience truthful. Focus on tools used, outcomes, responsibilities, and who benefited from the work.

resources.title: Harvard Resume and Cover Letter Guide
YouTube: Resume Bullet Writing for Internships

action_plan.title: Show Communication and Stakeholder Evidence
action_plan.why_it_matters: This role values communication, collaboration, or stakeholder work. A technical resume is stronger when it shows that you can explain findings, document work, and support people who are not technical.
action_plan.suggested_project: Add or rewrite one bullet showing how you presented findings, documented a process, worked with a team, or explained data to someone else.

resources.title: YouTube: How to Present Data Insights

action_plan.title: Build a Dashboard Project
action_plan.why_it_matters: Dashboarding and business intelligence skills are important for analytics roles because they show that you can turn data into something useful for decision-making.
action_plan.suggested_project: Create a dashboard using a public dataset. Track 4 to 6 key metrics, add filters, and write a short README explaining the business question and insights.

resources.title: Microsoft Learn: Power BI Learning Path
YouTube: Power BI Dashboard Project for Beginners
YouTube: Tableau Dashboard Project for Beginners

ai_gap_explanation.result:
- You have strong technical skills in R, Excel, and AI, which align well with data analysis and advanced analytics aspects of the role.
- The gap in Power BI and business intelligence tools is important because these are key for creating dashboards and visual reports that the job requires.
- Communication, collaboration, presentations, and organizational skills matter for effectively sharing insights and working in team settings.
- To improve, focus on learning Power BI (many free tutorials exist) and practice soft skills through group projects, presentations, or campus activities.
- Highlight any experience managing tasks or working in teams to show your growing organizational and interpersonal abilities.
